result.stdout:
Usage: DotnetGitTemplate [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  add     Add templates from git repository
  list    List repositories
  remove  Remove templates originated from the git repository
  update  Update templates from all repositories

Use "DotnetGitTemplate [command] --help" for more information about a command.
